title: Venezuelan Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Venezuela, made with tender beef and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef to the pot and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the sliced peppers, cayenne pepper, and black pepper to the pot.
Stir to combine and cook for 1 minute.
Add the browned beef back to the pot, along with 1 cup of beef broth.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 hour.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
